human_actions_pending.action: Run new multi-baseline UAT checks 1–4 from .planning/quick/20260531-mbl-multi-baseline-selector-toggle/20260531-mbl-SUMMARY.md
human_actions_pending.context: Verifies: (1) selector lists all baselines newest-first, (2) selector swap re-renders overlay, (3) Clear preserves Firestore docs (page reload proves no delete), (4) Set after clear creates Baseline N+1.

decisions.decision: Baseline overlay is additive SVG only — never modifies bar fills

decisions.rationale: User sees current position and drift, not baseline position

decisions.decision: WR-01 fix: injectBaselineOverlay called immediately after saveBaseline()
decisions.rationale: Overlay must render on first save without waiting for next snapshot
Prevents mutation of Frappe's internal state

decisions.decision: Multi-baseline accumulation — saveBaseline always creates a NEW Baseline N+1 doc; never overwrites
decisions.rationale: User confirmed 2026-05-31 — wants history of baselines for slip comparison across time

decisions.decision: Toolbar has selector dropdown listing all baselines newest-first + Set↔Clear toggle button (label flips by _activeBaselineId state)
decisions.rationale: User confirmed 2026-05-31 — single button that toggles state matches MS Project pattern; dropdown handles multi-baseline selection

decisions.decision: Clear Baseline hides overlay + resets selector to '— none —' but does NOT delete Firestore docs
decisions.rationale: User confirmed 2026-05-31 — baselines are historical record; delete affordance deferred until it becomes painful

decisions.decision: No per-baseline delete UI for now
decisions.rationale: User confirmed 2026-05-31 — ship smallest fix, revisit only if accumulation becomes a problem

next_action: Run the app, set 2-3 baselines on a project plan, exercise the selector + Clear/Set toggle, verify Firestore docs survive Clear (page reload). If all 7 original checks + 4 new checks pass, mark Phase 86.12 complete in ROADMAP.md and delete this HANDOFF.json.
context_notes: Multi-baseline implementation landed in commit 0d39f80. Quick task artifacts at .planning/quick/20260531-mbl-multi-baseline-selector-toggle/. After UAT passes, the close-out work is small: tick the ROADMAP checkbox, drop this file.
